evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Knowledge of data pipeline, ETL/ELT, workflow management and data warehousing
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: No explicit rigour signals (testing, governance) or velocity signals (fast-paced, ship quickly) are present in the JD, so neither dominates.
evidence.domain_risk: Millions of drivers and customers use our technology every day to connect with one another and move things that matter.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: On-demand logistics/delivery platform affecting operational business decisions, with no financial reporting or regulatory compliance language present.
evidence.data_team_maturity: work with the BIE teams to support different functional departments in terms of building and maintaining the data pipelines, reporting scripts and queries
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: A named BIE (BI Engineering) team structure supporting multiple departments indicates an established, growing data function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Experience working with complex datasets and ability to write efficient SQL queries against Hive and MySQL is a MUST, DORIS SQL as a plus
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific database technologies (Hive, MySQL, Doris SQL) give a concrete, precise picture of the technical environment.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: designing and creating data sources, visualizations, reports and metrics dashboards
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role centres on BI engineering deliverables (dashboards, reports, data sources) for internal functional departments generically, an internal_data pattern.
evidence.autonomy_level: work with the BIE teams to support different functional departments in terms of building and maintaining the data pipelines
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The framing is explicitly support-oriented ("support different functional departments") without ownership or direction-setting verbs.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No AI tool or AI infrastructure mention appears anywhere in the extracted JD text.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No testing, data quality framework, or data contract language appears anywhere in the extracted JD text.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The JD is framed entirely in delivery and capability terms with no risk or compliance register.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: building and maintaining the data pipelines, reporting scripts and queries
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The dominant verb is "maintaining" existing pipelines and reporting infrastructure across an established BIE team structure.
evidence.language_gate: Good command of English...Mandarin is a plus
